title: FabricBoost
description: FabricBoost is a Fabric modpack designed to give you the best Minecraft experience by boosting performance without sacrificing amazing optional shaders and enhanced graphics.
body:
FabricBoost is a Fabric modpack designed to give you the best Minecraft experience by boosting performance without sacrificing amazing optional shaders and enhanced graphics. If you've ever dealt with lag or very choppy frames but still want high-quality visuals, FabricBoost is made for you. It includes a carefully chosen selection of performance mods that make your game run way smoother—even on lower-end systems—while still keeping the game looking great.

In addition to performance improvements, FabricBoost enhances your gameplay with quality-of-life mods. The built-in map mod gives you a clear, detailed view of your surroundings, making exploration easier and more fun. Plus, the zoom mod lets you get a closer look at distant places or mobs with a simple keypress,  the experience immersive and keeping close to the base game.

Most of the mods in FabricBoost work on any server, but a few only work in your single-player world or on custom servers with those mods installed.

From smooth visuals to better navigation, FabricBoost makes Minecraft more enjoyable while keeping the core gameplay intact. If you want a modpack that boosts performance, improves visuals, and feels intuitive, FabricBoost is the perfect choice.
